since_last: 69% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +5.90%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC -2.55% · Gold -0.01% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 69% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +5.90%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +5.90%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.74%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +28.04%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +28.04%, AVAV +19.50%, CEVA +9.62%, VRT +8.81%, KLAC +8.68%. Laggards: DLR -5.75%, PINS -4.11%, EQIX -3.94%, TTD -3.43%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.86% at $170.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.86% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
